description: Overall Spotfire is a really good tool, that can be used daily to make sure as a organization we can showcase best possible version of data in a good understandable visuals without the highly complex things like vast formulae's or terminologies in the background.
author: AMIT B.
pros: The various features associated with designs, complex data tables usage, ability to generate good info links to get desired data for visualization helps a lot of our clients .
cons: We haven't come across any issues over the past 2 years of usage.

review_title: Spotfire: Setting the Gold Standard in Data Analytics Platforms
description: Overall I'm extremely happy with Spotfire. They continue to listen to analyst on how to improve the platform and turn out new versions frequently. I would pick Spotfire over any BI platform on the market.
author: Tyler K.
pros: Flexibility, Data prep and data wrangling abilities within the platform. Spotfire will allow any end user to enhance their data discovery which will allow for faster decision making.
cons: More customers should be using Spotfire. More capabilities than the two leading BI platforms on the market but they unfortunately own the market share. I've never met anyone that has used Spotfire that hasn't agreed Spotfire is a better tool. Spotfire's marketing strategy could use some work.

description: Decent software, however with some improvements with the interface could be excellent. Would recommend when dealing with large amounts of data.
author: Shane B.
pros: The range of different data analysis paths and visualisations available for use. Useful with large amounts of data.
cons: Learning curve is very steep and sometimes the written help isn't as accessible. Very confusing interface and sometimes can crash.

review_title: Great visualization tool for large data sets!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is extremely customizable so we have been able to create efficient templates that fit many of our process development engineering workflows. It links well with other systems to aggregate the data, and then using the tools we have created, we are able to easily line by/color by/trellis by a number of different experimental parameters to understand complex studies and DOEs with ease. It is a huge step up from our old workflow of graphing using Excel.
cons: It can be difficult to learn how to customize complex templates with our giant data sets, so we had to specialize a small team of admins to create templates and troubleshoot issues. However, as an end user, it is very straightforward.

description: Once I had some training on Spotfire, I never looked back and use it frequently when processing large amounts of data.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love that Spotfire is able to process large file sizes extremely quickly, which means filtering millions of rows in seconds and making it easy to find and sort filter options. In addition, the visualizations in the tool are practically limitless and allow users to make incredibly complex but extremely useful and informative reports.
cons: Spotfire is not easy to use and requires training from an experienced person to use. It is not nearly as user friendly as its competitors.

review_title: Higher Learning Curve But Great Software
description: It has a steeper learning curve than I'm used to in software, but once I got more comfortable, I was able to really enjoy it. There are tons of things I can do with with the data here that don't require editing the query. I'm able to create a variety charts, including pivot tables, and there are options to filter and un-filter things from my data table.
author: Tina L.
pros: There are lots of different features available and lots of customizations you can make to your reports. I like that I can apply transformations to the data in there without having to modify my queries. I like how much I can do with my charts, and I really love the feature that highlights the rows of my data table that went into a particular part of my chart when I click on it.
cons: It isn't as user friendly as what I'm used to (I'm used to Microsoft programs like Excel or Word, where everything is very straightforward). There was a longer learning period with this software before I was able to feel comfortable with it. The help guide here is kind of general. It doesn't have explicit instructions for everything, so I'm just experimenting a lot of the time to figure out how to do what I want to my report or chart. Also, it doesn't seem to have a feature that can automatically email you excel files. You have to log in and export the report yourself.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Spotfire is perhaps the best big data and data visualization software to work with R
description: I find that this software is the easiest to work with R, and the visualization/analytical capabilities make it generally worth the cost.
author: Thomas Y.
pros: Spotfire has a nice user interface that is easy to figure out and set up automated tasks. Perhaps the biggest advantage of Spotfire over other data visualization tools is its connection with R and the ease in which one can connect R scripts with Spotfire visualizations. The beginning process of visualizing data and the suggested visualizations that Spotfire offers is nice, although it does require a few more clicks if you don't like the suggestions Spotfire suggests.
cons: Spotfire is more expensive than other data visualization software, although I can see why. Spotfire has a host of additional graphical capabilities and analytical capabilities that I think justify the extra cost. It took me a little while to figure out how to set up the analytical models, but once set up, things run smoothly.

description: Very nice to use Business Intelligence tool, have user friendly interface and the basic functionality is easy to self-study. At a low cost and not so customized Dashboarding requirements Tibco Spotfire is very efficient.
author: Jonathan S.
pros: * User friendly interface and ease of access. * Good design and functionality for graphs. * Low cost. * Ability to embed Python, HTML, and JavaScript. * Plenty of data source options.
cons: * Hard to customize some visualization objects. * Few default functionality for computations especially on cross tables * Sometimes the text editor is auto changing the code layout once saved.

description: I m working in it for free years and I love it
author: Balaji L.
pros: This can be used across multiple data platform
cons: Complicated administration takes time to understand infrastructure

description: It enable us to deliver useful and competitive dashboards.
author: anthony E.
pros: can use javascript for integrating charts not existing on spotfire. best export tool to pdf and powerpoint. far away better than other tool.
cons: bad text editor for javascript. iF the javascript errors, you need to restart the whole IDE. small community support.

author: Cynthia C.
pros: Can handle large data batches with no problem without impacting the overall loading speed . You can also store documentation on the cloud ,there is plenty of storage space and it is easy to access . The visualization aesthetics are pleasing to look at and you can also include graphs in them .
cons: Learning the ropes is a bit hard and the available tutorials have some areas that are not easy to understand . Fortunately the community is really helpful . Incorporating data from too many different regions can get messy.
author_profession: Business Analyst/ GCR Social Responsibility Manager
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Spotfire is great tool for visualization and Dashboarding
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. Easy to use interface for building dashboards 2.Tight Integration and connector for popular databases
cons: 1.Tighter cloud integration 2.Need more Training material 3.New features and functionalities compare to Qlik or Tableau

review_title: Spotfire is Indispensable for Data Visualization
description: I use Spotfire to explore and visualize data from clinical trial, economic and financial databases. It is my go to method when exploring new datasets to get the quickest and best insights.
author: Reece H.
pros: It is blazingly fast. I work with datasets that have hundreds of thousands of entries, each with dozens of fields. Spotfire makes analyzing this data real time a snap.
cons: The learning curve is a bit steep, it takes a while to learn how to use it well. But the investment is well worth it.

review_title: I have worked with Spotfire since version 3.0 as a developer and BI PM
author: Jason B.
pros: The product continues to be developed and offer business a user enabling and powerful tool for visually analyzing data.
cons: Support from Vendor in the area of customer service is weak. Implementation as companies is done with little or no training making support a vital feature to organizations.

author: Juan N.
pros: It was not hard to get stared and create some visualizations and analysis which is the main purpose of a BI interface.
cons: Maybe is because I'm comparing it with another BI tools like Qlik or Tableau and that is why I think is an inferior product and just don't quite like it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Spotfire is an excellent solution for empowering business users to make confident, evidence-based decisions, however it's not a perfect solution for everyone.
author: Koay T.
pros: Very user friendly and user can manage without IT assistance Easy to use with dynamic dashboards and interactive visualization
cons: Lacking embedded BI and production reporting. A bit expensive and less practical than Qlik for quick report. Spotfire is not the best BI Tool for analytics reporting.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Is really good for what you need it to do
description: Very good experience overall. It does exactly what I need it to.
author: George F.
pros: Spotfire allows you to quickly identify outliers and explore data with high performance. Along with this is easy to use and has a convenient platform to identify trends and patterns. Spotfire is such a powerful tool that allows you to visualize data in an easy manner.
cons: Although it is easy to pick up, you will need to look online or consult training manuals for advanced features. It takes a long time to master this program.

description: Excellent tool but expensive for first-time firm usage/rollout.
author: Chris C.
pros: Excellent software that does a ton of visualizations for you.
cons: Cost to purchase is at server-level, which is too expensive for firms introducing analytics.

review_title: Very functional, but it is extremely expensive so our company as a whole is moving away from it
description: Great dashboards to provide insight into business operations for executive management
author: Brian S.
pros: There are great ways to create information links that can be shared between applications. Great visual representations exist to help the layperson understand how data is being connected.
cons: The user interface and setup isn't the most straightforward thing in the world. Even after using it for a couple of months there was still a lot going on that I didn't understand.

author: Clayton C.
pros: Spotfire has allowed me to automate so many manual workflows that I thought I would be stuck with throughout my career and has helped free up a lot of my time
cons: I wish there were more Spotfire power users that provided trainings on this tool

review_title: The Best Reporting Tool Around - HANDS DOWN!
description: Overall TIBCO has saved a lot of time and money by allowing our company to make quicker and more informative business decisions based on the depth of the data we are able to display. Additionally, the ability to import data from a broad spectrum of inputs makes this software a "must-have" for any organization that is serious about its reporting capabilities.
author: Alexander Y.
pros: Spotfire is the gold standard when it comes to analyzing and presenting your data in a meaningful way. There are so many robust options and metrics that are at your disposal and once you master the tool, it can really help take your reporting to the next level.
cons: Admittedly, there is a steep learning curve to mastering this tool, but that is to be expected. Once a basic understanding is reached, I do believe that the use will be able to start using some of the more advanced features in no time.

review_title: Spotfire - F1 Chose this, aren't you?
description: Though the product is capable of doing the business needs, it need a good skilled resource to extract the most benefit out of it. It is a good learning process. Luckily TIBCO provides good technical support and official community page to get answers from peer.
author: Surya P.
pros: What not? A fully packed highly profitable & flagship product of TIBCO Software. It not only benefits the product owner, it benefits twice to Customers. One of the leading BI / Data Analytics Tool which has been chosen by Formula 1 for lap time and crashes simulator prediction. It can integrate with wide variety of data Source. Can be adopted by industries like Finance, healthcare, energy and utility, logistics, etc
cons: Pricing and Complex to install and use. Need skill.

review_title: More a visualization tool (interactive), decent BI tool
description: We were able to help the client visualize their complicated data in an easy to understand format using pie charts, heat map, etc. that they were able to update easily to run different potential scenarios.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's a great visualization tool when itegrated with a more robust BI (Business Intelligence) tool. The filtering capibility of this tool are impressive! On a side panel, as you keep applying filters, on the other side, you can easily visualize the results. I remember taking all the training online which was easily available and we were also able to contact a representative for questions. They also help with professional installation.
cons: I selected and implemented this tool at a cilent site. Where the visualization features were pretty robust, we needed to integrate this with a stronger BI tool to be able to do complicated analytics. It can a bit pricey but it's meant for bigger organizations, hence not that big of a concern.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease of use, the way you can set up reporting to show exactly what you want to see, along with the UX.
cons: The reports aren't the easiest to set up, although they do show incredible amounts of data in great visualizations.

description: Making dashboards for top management so that they can drive growth by making decisions by looking at the data.
author: Anna A.
pros: Dashboards are used to make business decisions which are data driven and are very powerful , intuitive in nature. Data can extracted from any format almost.
cons: You got to spend years to fully utilize the tool. It is such a powerful tool.
